channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 13.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Minister insists Labour will not apply national living wage to all over-18s before election – UK politics live
item.description: Minister insists Labour will not apply national living wage to all over-18s before election – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Ministers unveil new crackdown on Russian saboteurs trying to damage Britain’s vital undersea cables
item.description: Ministers unveil new crackdown on Russian saboteurs trying to damage Britain’s vital undersea cables

item.title: The Guardian: Keir Starmer - The Guardian

Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Bigger disappointment than Starmer. She is currently sleep-walking into a BBC Charter renewal without any brave thinking - reviving Project Kangaroo via iPlayer; driving a tech levy to pay BBC and local media. She’s d...
item.description: Bigger disappointment than Starmer. She is currently sleep-walking into a BBC Charter renewal without any brave thinking - reviving Project Kangaroo via iPlayer; driving a tech levy to pay BBC and local media. She’s d...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Do not hold back any Mandelson documents, Tories tell Starmer as they issue contempt warning
item.description: Do not hold back any Mandelson documents, Tories tell Starmer as they issue contempt warning

item.title: i Politics: Four things Burnham’s ‘manifesto’ reveals about his plans - from housing to asylum
item.description: Four things Burnham’s ‘manifesto’ reveals about his plans - from housing to asylum

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): ‘This is so pathetic’: Reform and Restore Britain lock horns in Makerfield byelection buildup
item.description: ‘This is so pathetic’: Reform and Restore Britain lock horns in Makerfield byelection buildup

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer condemns Russian drone crash in Romania as ‘serious violation of Nato airspace’
item.description: Starmer condemns Russian drone crash in Romania as ‘serious violation of Nato airspace’

item.title: BBC Politics: Will the new Welsh first minister complete the journey to delivering M4 relief?
item.description: Will the new Welsh first minister complete the journey to delivering M4 relief?

item.title: Novara Media: Netanyahu Orders IDF to Seize 70% of Gaza
item.description: Netanyahu Orders IDF to Seize 70% of Gaza
